findings.evidence: Customer::longMethod at lines 63–73 has 11 statements performing multiple tasks.
Customer::duplicateMethod at lines 82–86 calls orderPizza twice with the same argument.
Customer::accessInternalDetails at lines 108–110 uses a chain of method calls: pizzaShop->getCashier()->hurryUpChef().
Customer::middlemanMethod at lines 93–95 simply delegates to middleMethod.
Customer::middleMethod at lines 98–100 simply delegates to realMethod.
Customer::accessInternalDetails at lines 108–110 calls hurryUpChef on a Chef object obtained from the Shop.
